attributes.description:
Promise is camera accountability for focus you cannot fake.

Make one clear promise, start a focused session, and stay present until it is complete.

If you enable camera accountability, the app monitors compliance while it is active in foreground. Missing the contract records a broken promise.

Features:
- Promise seal status and streak momentum
- Camera accountability during active contracts
- Custom voice lines and strict reminders
- Ledger history of kept and broken promises
attributes.promotionalText: Make a promise, stay on camera, and prove you kept your word.
attributes.whatsNew: Promise branding update, improved accountability copy, and latest release fixes.
